content:
# Recommendations — for the iter-016 plan agent

## Closest to completion — PRIORITIZE

### FBC `gammaPushforwardIso_comp_bridge` (the ENTIRE FBC foundation residual)
The morphism-level route **succeeded**: `gammaPushforwardIso_comp` is cold-build-green and sorry-free in its
own body; the whole foundation now hinges on this ONE small bridge sorry (FBC L741/L753).
- **Goal is fully reduced**: `eqToHom ⋯ ≫ moduleSpecΓFunctor.map ((pushforwardComp (Spec.map ρ) (Spec.map φ)).inv.app N) = eqToHom ⋯`.
- **The wall**: closing `(pushforwardComp …).inv.app N = 𝟙` by `rfl`/`congr`/`show … = 𝟙 from rfl` whnf-reduces
  `pushforwardComp` (= `Iso.refl`) across the value-`ModuleCat`/`X.Modules` junction → kernel timeout
  (LSP-clean, cold-bomb).
- **Concrete fix to try (small, scoped)**: prove `(pushforwardComp …).inv.app N = 𝟙 _` via sheaf-hom
  extensionality WITHOUT whnf'ing the iso: `SheafOfModules.Hom.ext` (or `Scheme.Modules.Hom.ext`) + the
  per-open identity `pushforwardComp_inv_app_app` (`= 𝟙` at every open, EXISTS, loogle-verified). Then
  `Functor.map_id; Category.comp_id` (or `eqToHom_trans`) closes the residual. **Cold-build self-check
  mandatory** (revert-on-bomb).
- **DO NOT trigger the queued junction-free refactor of `gammaPushforwardIso`.** The plan's reversal signal
  ("FBC bomb/fragile ⇒ refactor") does NOT fire: the morphism route already defeated the bomb; the refactor
  would discard a near-complete foundation. This is a prover lane, not a refactor lane.
- After the bridge closes: `gammaPushforwardIso_comp` is axiom-clean → the crux
  `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural` (L1358, sorry @L1435) unblocks (conjugate-mate route, LIVE).

## Promising but needs a structural change — DO NOT warm-retry

### SNAP `tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator_hK_lhs` + `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head`
Both stalled at the **μ-syntactic-identity wall** (5 consecutive iters now churning on hK_lhs). The prover
correctly STOPPED. **Do NOT re-assign a prover on the same recipe** — Step 1b MERGE and the head-cancel are
the SAME wall (two `μ_X` printing identically but carrying hidden distinct `Localization.fac` proof terms;
`rw` no-match, `slice`/`simp`/`erw` isDefEq-timeout).
- **FIRE the 3rd mathlib-analogist** (the plan's pre-committed reversal signal) on the SYNTACTIC-SHAPE
  question: how to cancel a `μ_X.hom ≫ μ_X.inv` pair whose two `Localization.Monoidal.μ` occurrences differ
  only in the embedded `Localization.fac` witness. Candidate angles: `Localization.Monoidal` μ-cancel API;
  `Subsingleton.elim` / proof-irrelevance on the `Localization.fac` witness to make the two μ's
  token-identical; or restate the keystone so the μ object-arg is canonical. The head-helper has already
  REDUCED everything to this single cancel and its tail is GREEN — only the token-identity is missing.

### SNAP gated cascade (untouched, correctly deferred)
`tensorPowAdd_rightUnit`, `tensorPowAdd_braiding`, `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (base+succ), `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`
— all transitively gated on the hK_lhs assembly. Do NOT assign until hK_lhs closes.

## Coverage debt — `archon dag-query unmatched` (planner to blueprint)
- **`AlgebraicGeometry.gammaPushforwardIso_comp_bridge`** (FBC L741) — no blueprint block. Depends on
  `pushforwardComp_inv_app_app`, `eqToHom_map`. Give it its own `\lean{}` block (UNmarked — body is `sorry`),
  with a `\uses` edge FROM `lem:gammaPushforwardIso_comp` TO it. Also: the `lem:gammaPushforwardIso_comp`
  `\uses{lem:globalSectionsIso_hom_comp3_specMap_appTop}` edge is now STALE (the realized proof does not
  invoke that coherence at the composite level — `% NOTE` added); the writer should drop it or relocate it
  one level down into `lem:gammaPushforwardIso`.
- **`AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head`** (SNAP L1890) — no blueprint block. It is
  exactly Step 5 (head reduction) of `lem:tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs`. Promote to its own `\lean{}` block
  (UNmarked — `sorry`).
- ~75 other unmatched are the known `RelativeTensorCoequalizer.*` / `W_*` SNAP impl helpers — stay DEFERRED
  to the dedicated SNAP file-split refactor (documented since iter-008).

## Code-hygiene (MEDIUM/LOW — bundle into the eventual mate-excision iter)
- `lean-auditor iter015`: `set_option maxHeartbeats` mis-scoped onto `/-! -/` headers at FBC L1499 +
  L1534-1537 (the seam-2/3 theorems incl. `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` get default budget). On the
  COMPILE-DEAD mate region → low urgency; fix when the mate decls are excised.
- Stale comments: FBC L753 bridge comment still claims "closed by `rfl`" (false — kernel-bombs);
  FBC L184-247 parent-project `iter-234/236/240/241` references; SNAP L1999 `iter-014 COLD-PROBE` label.
  Prover-domain comment fixes; bundle.
- `import Mathlib` monolithic (FBC L6) — minor, leave.

## Reusable patterns landed (full text in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- FBC morphism-level + per-map-absorbed-ring-content route (defeats the junction kernel bomb).
- SNAP μ-syntactic-identity wall characterization (token-identity, not head-algebra, is what's missing).
